name: Three Bean and Sausage Soup
recipeIngredient: 16 oz russet potatoes, peeled and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute sausage, onions, celery, and garlic in a 5-quart pot until vegetables are softened, about 3 minutes.
2. Add bouillon, tomatoes, and water. Bring to a boil, breaking up tomatoes with a spoon.
3. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes.
4. Wash kale thoroughly, remove stems, and cut into narrow strips; set aside.
5. Prepare carrots and potatoes.
6. Stir potatoes and carrots into the pot; cover and simmer for 10 minutes.
7. Add beans and kale; cover and simmer for an additional 15 minutes or until all vegetables are tender.
8. Mash some beans against the side of the pot with the back of a large spoon to thicken the soup.
